goal: Card-meaning popup overlapped by the bottom lang/report FABs (it was a bottom sheet)
root_cause: On mobile the .card-sheet-overlay anchored the sheet to the bottom (align-items:end, top-only radius, slide-up) — right where the fixed EN|TH pill + Report FAB sit, so they overlapped the popup. (Desktop ≥768px was already centered.)
fix: Base .card-sheet-overlay → place-items:center + z-index 1300 (above nav + FABs, so the backdrop dims them); .card-sheet → all-corner radius 22px, width min(420px,92vw), max-height 88dvh, all-around shadow, scale/translate entrance. Now a floating centered modal on every screen size.
verified: chrome MCP @390x844 celtic result: tap card → sheet floats centered (top 129, bottom 715 of 844), FABs dimmed behind the backdrop, no overlap. md5 parity canonical=www=ios.
notes: The ≥768px override is now redundant but harmless (same centered intent).
